title: Acceptance contract
description: Machine-readable form of what 'done / good' means for one loop, in checkable terms. The maker must not modify this; a change creates a new goal_version requiring independent approval.

goal_version.description: Version of the goal/contract. Bumped only on an approved change, never by the maker.

summary.description: One-line human statement of the goal.

criteria.description: Each acceptance criterion: concrete and individually checkable.

checker_ref.description: Pointer to the check: test id, rubric item, or judge config.

hidden_from_maker.description: True for holdout/sentinel criteria the maker must not see (anti-gaming).

stop_conditions.description: Implement all three; halt the moment any one trips.

threshold.description: What 'met' means, e.g. all criteria pass on the holdout set.

no_progress.description: Executable definition of stalled progress (e.g. failing-criteria count stops dropping).

irreversible_actions.description: Actions that must live at the commit gate, outside the inner loop.
